languages.text: "Этот ксенос все равно умудрился посмеяться над нами. Даже проиграв в бою. Но, думаю, Бог-Император простит нам грех поступи по священному Патенту". {n}Голос Инцендии сух и тих.{/n}

"That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Этот ксенос все равно умудрился посмеяться над нами. Даже проиграв в бою. Но, думаю, Бог-Император простит нам грех поступи по священному Патенту". {n}Голос Инцендии сух и тих.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

"That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

"That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

languages.text: 「あの異種族は、戦いに敗れても最後の笑いを手に入れた。神皇帝は聖なる保証書を踏んだことを許してくれるだろう」{n}インセンディアの声は冷たく静かだ.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「あの異種族は、戦いに敗れても最後の笑いを手に入れた。神皇帝は聖なる保証書を踏んだことを許してくれるだろう。」{n}インセンディアの声は冷たく静かだ.{/n}

languages.text: «Ese xenos ha encontrado la forma de reír el último a pesar de ser derrotado en combate. Pero creo que el Dios Emperador nos perdonará por haber pisado la sagrada Patente». {n}La voz de Incendia es fría y callada.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Ese xenos ha encontrado la forma de reír el último a pesar de ser derrotado en combate. Pero creo que el Dios Emperador nos perdonará por haber pisado la sagrada Patente». {n}La voz de Incendia es fría y callada.{/n}

languages.text: "Der Xenos hat es tatsächlich geschafft, zuletzt zu lachen. Trotz seiner Niederlage. Ich glaube aber, der Gottimperator wird uns vergeben, dass wir auf den heiligen Handelsbrief getreten sind." {n}Incendias Stimme ist kalt und ruhig.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Der Xenos hat es tatsächlich geschafft, zuletzt zu lachen. Trotz seiner Niederlage. Ich glaube aber, der Gottimperator wird uns vergeben, dass wir auf den heiligen Handelsbrief getreten sind." {n}Incendias Stimme ist kalt und ruhig.{/n}

languages.text: « Le xénos a trouvé le moyen d'avoir le dernier mot. Malgré notre victoire. Mais je suis convaincue que l'Empereur-Dieu nous pardonnera d'avoir piétiné la lettre de marque sacrée. » {n}déclare Argenta d'un ton glacial.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Le xénos a trouvé le moyen d'avoir le dernier mot. Malgré notre victoire. Mais je suis convaincue que l'Empereur-Dieu nous pardonnera d'avoir piétiné la lettre de marque sacrée. » {n}déclare Argenta d'un ton glacial.{/n}

languages.text: “即便在战斗中落败，那个异形终究还是笑到了最后。但我相信，神皇会宽恕我们踩踏神圣贸易授状的行为。”{n}因森蒂娅的声音冰冷而平静。{/n}
languages.original_text: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “即便在战斗中落败，那个异形终究还是笑到了最后。但我相信，神皇会宽恕我们踩踏神圣贸易授状的行为。”{n}因森蒂娅的声音冰冷而平静。{/n}

languages.text: "O zeno, son gülen olmanın bir yolunu bir şekilde buldu. Çatışmada yenilmesine rağmen hem de. Fakat Tanrı İmparator'un kutsal Ruhsatname'yi çiğnediğimiz için bizi affedeceğine inanıyorum." {n}İncendia'nın sesi, soğuk ve sessiz çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "That xenos still found a way to have the last laugh. Even after losing in battle. But I believe the God-Emperor will forgive us for treading on the sacred Warrant." {n}Incendia's voice is cold and quiet.{/n}
